basic_details.job_title: Gujarat University Teaching and Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 14 Assistant Professor, Office Boy and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat University has released the official Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 notification. A total of 14 vacancies have been announced under the Gujarat University Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates possessing qualifications such as MBA in relevant specializations, M.Com, BCA/B.Sc-IT/MCA/M.Sc-IT, or any Graduate degree with the prescribed skills can apply through email on or before 15 June 2026. Candidates should refer to the official notification for age limit details. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: All Posts: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details. Age Relaxation: Please refer to the official notification for age relaxation details.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA in various specializations, M.Com, BCA/BSC-IT/MCA/MSC-IT, Any Graduate, Ability to read and understand vernacular language.
qualification.details: Assistant Professor: MBA (Finance / Marketing / Human Resource Management/ Operations) with minimum 55% from Recognized University; OR MBA (Maritime Management)/ Post Graduate Diploma in Maritime Management with minimum 55% from Recognized University; OR MBA (Supply Chain Management) with minimum 55% from Recognized University. Experience: 8-15 years of Experience in the relevant field OR 8-10 years of Experience in the Maritime Industry + Academics OR 8-10 years of Experience in the Supply Chain Industry/Maritime Industry + Academics. Teaching Assistant: MBA (General Management) with minimum 55% from Recognized University. Experience: 4-5 Year Teaching Experience. Administrative Executive Cum Counselor: MBA (General Management) with minimum 50% from Recognized University. Experience: 5-6 years of experience in Private or Govt. Academic Institute. Computer Programmer Cum Operator: BCA/BSC-IT/MCA/ MSC - IT with minimum 50% from Recognized University. Experience: 4-5 years of Experience in Private or Govt. Academic Institute. Administrative Executive Cum Accountant: M.Com with Minimum 50% from a recognized university. Experience: 3-4 years of Experience in Private or Govt. Academic Institute. Office Assistant: Any Graduate/Post Graduate with Minimum 50% from a recognized university. Experience: Proficiency in Computer, Gujarati, & English Typing. Office Boy: Able to read and understand the vernacular language. Experience: 2-3 years of Experience in Private or Govt. Academic Institute. Office Boy Cum Sweeper: Able to read and understand the vernacular language.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Gujarat University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Gujarat University Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Gujarat University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Gujarat University Recruitment 2026 is 15-06-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Gujarat University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies announced for various teaching and non-teaching posts in the Gujarat University Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for Gujarat University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for Gujarat University Recruitment 2026 is via email. Candidates need to send their applications to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Assistant Professor post in Gujarat University Recruitment 2026 is Rs. 80,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Office Assistant post is any Graduate/Post Graduate degree with a minimum of 50% marks from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an age limit for the posts announced by Gujarat University?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details for each post. Age relaxation may also be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Gujarat University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for Gujarat University Recruitment 2026 primarily involves an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply for multiple posts in Gujarat University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification should be consulted for details on whether candidates can apply for multiple posts. Typically, specific instructions are provided regarding this.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates are generally required to submit self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with their application.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for Gujarat University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the Gujarat University official website or via the provided link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
